name: biometricAuth
description: Simulate biometric authentication (fingerprint) on Android emulators. Trigger match/fail/cancel actions for testing biometric prompts.

action.description: Biometric action: 'match' triggers successful authentication, 'fail' simulates non-matching biometric, 'cancel' cancels the prompt

modality.description: Biometric modality (default: 'any'). Currently only 'fingerprint' is reliably supported on Android emulators. 'face' is not consistently supported.

fingerprintId.description: Fingerprint ID to simulate (default: 1 for 'match', 2 for 'fail'). Use enrolled ID (typically 1) for match, non-enrolled ID (typically 2) for fail.

keepScreenAwake.description: Keep physical Android devices awake during the session (default: true)

name: changeLocalization
description: Change locale, time zone, text direction, and time format

keepScreenAwake.description: Keep physical Android devices awake during the session (default: true)
Keep physical Android devices awake during the session (default: true)

action.description: Clipboard action: copy=set clipboard, paste=paste into focused field, clear=clear clipboard, get=get clipboard content

keepScreenAwake.description: Keep physical Android devices awake during the session (default: true)

name: criticalSection
description: Coordinate multiple devices at a synchronization barrier and execute steps serially. All devices must reach the critical section before any can proceed. Steps execute one device at a time in the order they acquire the lock.

lock.description: Global lock identifier. All devices using the same lock name will wait for each other at this barrier.

steps.description: Steps to execute serially within the critical section. Each step should target a specific device using the 'device' parameter.

deviceCount.description: Number of devices expected to reach this critical section. All devices must arrive before any can proceed.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for waiting at the barrier (default: 30000ms)

name: deviceSnapshot
description: Capture or restore a device snapshot for the active device.

includeAppData.description: Include app data directories in snapshot

useVmSnapshot.description: Use emulator VM snapshot if available (faster, emulator only)

strictBackupMode.description: If true, fail entire snapshot if app data backup fails or times out

backupTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for adb backup user confirmation

userApps.description: Which apps to backup: 'current' (foreground app only) or 'all' (all user-installed apps)

vmSnapshotTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for emulator VM snapshot commands

appBundleIds.description: iOS-only: bundle IDs to include in app data snapshots (omit to skip app data capture)

keepScreenAwake.description: Keep physical Android devices awake during the session (default: true)

name: doctor
description: Run diagnostic checks to verify AutoMobile setup and environment configuration

installCmdlineTools.description: Automatically download and install Android SDK Command-line Tools to ANDROID_HOME if missing

installXcodeCommandLineTools.description: Install Xcode Command Line Tools if missing

keepScreenAwake.description: Keep physical Android devices awake during the session (default: true)

name: executePlan
description: Execute a series of tool calls from a YAML plan content. Stops execution if any step fails (success: false). Optionally can resume execution from a specific step index.

keepScreenAwake.description: Keep physical Android devices awake during the session (default: true)

deviceAllocationTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for allocating all devices (default: 300000 = 5 minutes)

cleanupAppId.description: App ID to terminate after execution

name: exportPlan
description: Stop the active test recording and export recorded interactions as a YAML plan. Returns the plan content.

recordingId.description: Recording ID to export (uses active recording if not specified)

planName.description: Name for the exported plan (auto-generated if not specified)

keepScreenAwake.description: Keep physical Android devices awake during the session (default: true)

name: highlight
description: Draw a visual highlight around a UI element on the device screen for debugging.

container.description: Container selector object to scope search. Provide { "elementId": "<id>" } or { "text": "<text>" }.

containerOf.description: Whether to highlight the container of the selected element

selectionStrategy.description: Element selection strategy when multiple matches are found (default: first)

name: startTestRecording
description: Start test recording mode on the active device. Records user interactions for later export as a test plan. Returns the session ID which can be used with exportPlan.

includeSystemInsets.description: Use full screen including status/nav bars

container.description: Container selector object to scope search. Provide { "elementId": "<id>" } or { "text": "<text>" }.

gestureType.description: swipeFingerTowardsDirection: finger moves in direction (e.g., 'up' = finger up = content scrolls down). scrollTowardsDirection: content moves in direction (e.g., 'up' = content up = see content below). Default: scrollTowardsDirection.

lookFor.description: Element to look for during swipe

elementId.description: ID of the element to look for

boomerang.description: Return to start position after swipe apex

apexPause.description: Pause duration at swipe apex in ms (0-3000)

keepScreenAwake.description: Keep physical Android devices awake during the session (default: true)

action.description: Action: open=expand tray, find=search for notification, tap=tap notification, dismiss=swipe away, clearAll=dismiss all for app

tapActionLabel.description: Action button label to tap (for 'tap' action)

awaitTimeout.description: Timeout in ms to wait for notification (default: 5000)

name: videoRecording
description: Start or stop a low-overhead video recording for the active device.

highlights.description: Optional highlights to show during recording
